signals.headline: Ethereum Shows Early Recovery with High Network Growth and ETF Inflows; XRP Sees ETF Inflows and XRPL Privacy Upgrades |
signals.raw:
Ethereum Shows Early Recovery with High Network Growth and ETF Inflows; XRP Sees ETF Inflows and XRPL Privacy Upgrades | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][2]

Ethereum is trading at $2,184, forming a bullish pattern after declines, with RSI near oversold, easing supply pressure from 70,000 ETH staked by the Ethereum Foundation ($143M+), and $11.6B cumulative U.S. spot ETH ETF inflows (BlackRock at $6.5B

signals.headline: Kevin Warsh confirmation hearing for Fed Chair underway amid inflation critiques | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Kevin Warsh confirmation hearing for Fed Chair underway amid inflation critiques | NO | HIGH confidence**  
No breaking announcements today (April 22, 2026) on inflation, tariffs, or Powell's policy; latest developments from April 21 involve Senate questioning of Kevin Warsh—Trump's nominee to replace Jerome Powell—on past support for rate cuts during high inflation and Fed independence[3][4][5].
